_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide expertise to the development of measures of effectiveness and measures of performance.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.533), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.532).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.534). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [development, effectiveness, expertise, measures, performance, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.890, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (95.0%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Provide expertise to the development of measures of effectiveness and measures o" and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.563 ≈ STS 0.534 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [development, effectiveness, expertise, measures, performance, provide]. WIDAI terms: [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing].
